name: Justice Manoj Misra
bio: Justice Manoj Misra is a judge of the Supreme Court of India who was elevated from the Allahabad High Court. Prior to his elevation to the high court, he was an advocate practising at the Allahabad High Court. He has expertise in constitutional law, criminal law, and revenue matters. Justice Misra has been part of benches hearing several significant cases including the Electoral Bonds case and the NEET paper leak case.
